ddls:
CREATE TABLE "extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the extension (e.g., chrome-extension://) */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the extension (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the extension (e.g., productivity, entertainment) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extension */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL pointing to the extension's icon */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the extension */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the extension */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of times the extension has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extensions_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extensions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES extension_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extensions_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the extension type (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extension type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., productivity, entertainment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension version */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  "major_version" INTEGER /* Major version number */,
  "minor_version" INTEGER /* Minor version number */,
  "patch_version" INTEGER /* Patch version number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_versions_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the extension */,
  "used_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the extension has been used */,
  "last_access_time" INTEGER /* Last time the extension was accessed */,
  "last_modified_time" INTEGER /* Last time the extension was modified */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the extension was used */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'install', 'uninstall', 'update') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_usage_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_permissions_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the extension */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_reviews_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extension_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID of the developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_extensions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the extension is enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "extension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID of the analytic entry */,
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the extension */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'install', 'uninstall', 'update') */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_extension_id FOREIGN KEY ("extension_id") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_id")
)
